title: PEER SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: DOUGY CENTER EAST PEER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides open-ended peer support groups for those grieving a death, as well as groups for individuals living with advanced serious illness. Services are available in-person and online. Also offers specialized information and referral on these topics. 3909 SE 52nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Children and teens ages 3-18 and young adults ages 19-35 and their families who have experienced the death of a parent, primary caregiver, or sibling Hours: Support group times vary Email (503) 775-5683 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 775-5683 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for orientation appointment or current support group schedule FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Bereaved Child Support Groups Bereaved Parent Support Groups General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Terminal Illness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGY CENTER EAST
